zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle於1320年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆時，她的父親Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale36歲，母親Catherine Normandy De Artois28歲。她於1340年與Jean d'Harcourt III在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年4月12日享年67歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle于1320年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆时，她的父亲Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale36岁，母亲Catherine Normandy De Artois28岁。她于1340年与Jean d'Harcourt III在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年4月12日享年67岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle was born in 1320, in Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale, was 36 and her mother, Catherine Normandy De Artois, was 28. She married Jean d'Harcourt III in 1340, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 April 1387, at the age of 67, and was buried in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle est née en 1320, à Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Catherine Normandy De Artois, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Jean d'Harcourt III en 1340, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1387, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.Harcourt Cailleville: Harcourt, Smith's Sound, Neufundland und Labrador, Kanada
de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle 1320 in Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale 36 und ihre Mutter Catherine Normandy De Artois 28. Sie hat 1340 in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jean d'Harcourt III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. April 1387 im Alter von 67 Jahren und wurde in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle è nata il nel 1320 nel Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Catherine Normandy De Artois, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Jean d'Harcourt III nel 1340, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1387, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalleが1320年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメで生まれた時，父Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumaleは36歳，母Catherine Normandy De Artoisは28歳であった。1340年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウでJean d'Harcourt IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年4月12日に67歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.Harcourt Cailleville: 캐나다 뉴펀들랜드 래브라도 스미스'스 소우드 하르쿠르트
ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle(이)가 1320년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Normandy De Artois(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1340년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 Jean d'Harcourt III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 4월 12일 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle nasceu em 1320, em Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Normandy De Artois, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean d'Harcourt III em 1340, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1387, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.Harcourt Cailleville: харкоурт, смит'с соунд, Ньюфаундленд и Лабрадор, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle родилась в 1320 г. в местности сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Normandy De Artois, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean d'Harcourt III в 1340 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1387 г. в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle nació en 1320, en Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Catherine Normandy De Artois, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jean d'Harcourt III en 1340, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1387, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
